ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use [FOLDER] placeholder to specify current folder's name. Vault's name will be used as [FOLDER] in root directory. You can use RegEx pattern as follows /.../
ast.target: 使用 [FOLDER] 占位符指定当前文件夹名称。在根目录中将使用 Vault 的名称作为 [FOLDER]。你可以使用如下正则表达式模式 /.../

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can use [VAULT] placeholder to specify vault's name.
ast.target: 你可以使用 [VAULT] 占位符指定 Vault 的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if all files (not just .md or .canvas) should be refereced in respective indexes.
ast.target: 勾选后将所有文件（不只是 .md 或 .canvas）在对应索引中被引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can specify file name patterns, one for each line. Use * as wildcard(any character) and [FOLDER], [VAULT], [INDEX] for respective filenames. RegEx can be used like this /.../ too.
ast.target: 你可以指定文件名模式，每行一个。使用 * 作为通配符（任意字符），并使用 [FOLDER]、[VAULT]、[INDEX] 作为相应文件名。也可以使用如下正则表达式 /.../。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Each link will occupy its own line for easy copying. Use [LINKS] plug to indicate where they should go.
ast.target: 每个链接占据一行，便于复制。使用 [LINKS] 插入点指示它们应放置的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If checked, missing links will be added to the beginning of index file, not the end.
ast.target: 勾选后，缺失的链接将添加到索引文件的开头，而不是末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use [FOLDER] and [INDEX] to specify folder name and current index filename.
ast.target: 使用 [FOLDER] 和 [INDEX] 来指定文件夹名称和当前索引文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will check automatically every time the vault is opened. Alternatively you can trigger check manually, see below.
ast.target: 每次打开库时都会自动检查。也可以手动触发检查，见下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can also use a button on the left side of your workspase.
ast.target: 你也可以使用工作区左侧的按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can use .canvas file as indexes as easy as .md (note) files. Click to see options specific to Canvas indexes.
ast.target: 你可以像使用 .md（笔记）文件一样轻松地使用 .canvas 文件作为索引。点击查看 Canvas 索引的专属选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended for easy handling. You can specify how group should be titled.
ast.target: 推荐用于便捷处理。你可以指定组的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can specify location (corner) in reference to existing Canvas content.
ast.target: 你可以参考现有 Canvas 内容来指定位置（角落）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The height of 50 is currently the minimum needed for the filename to fit. Choose width to your liking.
ast.target: 高度 50 目前是容纳文件名所需的最小值。宽度可按需选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You've clicked something and it's not working any more? This might help.
ast.target: 你点击了某个东西后它就不工作了？这可能会有帮助。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How your index files are named?
ast.target: 你的索引文件如何命名？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Is index file in root folder named differently?
ast.target: 根文件夹中的索引文件是否使用不同名称？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should files in nested folders be referenced in indexes?
ast.target: 索引中是否应引用嵌套文件夹中的文件？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should non-notes files (like images) be linked in indexes?
ast.target: 索引中是否应链接非笔记文件（如图片）？

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 哪些文件应被忽略？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Where missing links should be added?
ast.target: 应将缺失的链接添加到哪里？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How added links should be formatted?
ast.target: 新增链接应如何格式化？

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将缺失链接前置（而非追加）？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How separate output file should be named?
ast.target: 独立输出文件应如何命名？

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启动时检查索引？

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 立即检查！

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Where files missing in Canvas indexes should be added?
ast.target: 在 Canvas 索引中缺失的文件应添加到哪里？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should files added to Canvas index be grouped?
ast.target: 添加到 Canvas 索引的文件需要分组吗？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Where on Canvas missing files should be placed?
ast.target: Canvas 上缺失的文件应放置在哪里？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: What dimensions should files added to Canvas be?
ast.target: 添加到 Canvas 的文件尺寸应该是多少？
